list.name: Pokedex
list.des:
Pokedex is application will help you research name, type, profile, evolutions and moves of any Pokémon.When we play Pokémon Go, it is very important to know all things about Pokémon before training them, what the moves they can learn, what will they look like when they evolved, how much hp they have, etc...
And the best part is, our app don't need internet connection to run, so it's 100% OFFLINE. You can research anywhere, anytime, when you like. Hope that our app will help you become a best trainer in the world. So let's go Pokémon trainer!
